prose:
**Fukui Reactivity Analysis of Aniline** — DFT, **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (tier standard, density-fit), PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry from fixed input coordinates. Mulliken-population Fukui indices computed via SCF (neutral, cation N+1, anion N−1 doublet states, all converged). Most nucleophilic site: **N (f⁻ = 0.2045)**. Most electrophilic site: **C3 ortho carbon (f⁺ = 2.2976)**. The amino group donates electron density to the aromatic ring, activating the ortho (C3, C4: f⁺ ≈ 2.30) and para (C7: f⁺ = 1.40) positions toward nucleophilic substitution, while the nitrogen remains the primary site for electrophilic attack. All Fukui sum rules conserved (Σf⁺ = 1.0, Σf⁻ = 1.0); SCF converged for all states. Dual descriptor (Δf) confirms ortho/para electrophilic character relative to the rest of the ring. No warnings reported.</prose>
<parameter name="integrity_trustworthy">true
